content.text:
⊰IUTP

I'll read all the PNG images and create descriptions for each Figma design page.

⊰IUTP

Based on the Figma design pages I've reviewed, here is the indexed table of descriptions:

| Page | Description |
| --- | --- |
| figma-280 | Voucher onboarding screen: reusable multiple times, with car illustration |
| figma-281 | Auto-applied discount confirmation screen with woman at desk illustration |
| figma-282 | Input validation spec: auto-correct points above maximum available |
| figma-283 | "Use All" button behavior: syncs points total with available points |
| figma-291 | Parking discount voucher creation form with value and currency inputs |
| figma-292 | Parking discount form with 500 points and R$ 5.00 filled, enabled button |
| figma-295 | Review voucher confirmation screen with creation timestamp and info callout |
| figma-296 | Parking voucher creation with error state overlay and button disabled |
| figma-298 | Input constraint spec: discount applies only to open invoices |
| figma-304 | Maximum value constraint: total points user possesses limit |
| figma-307 | Terms and conditions screen: voucher usage rules and important notes |
| figma-309 | Create voucher carousel hero: "Use points and create a discount voucher" |
| figma-312 | Parking app screen with Sem Parar logo and reusable voucher messaging |
| figma-314 | Auto-applied discount confirmation screen with woman at desk illustration |
| figma-316 | Input validation spec: auto-correct points above maximum available |
| figma-318 | "Use All" button behavior: syncs points total with available points |
| figma-319 | Input validation error state: minimum value requirement highlighted |
| figma-320 | Input validation error state: minimum currency value requirement shown |
| figma-321 | Maximum value constraint: total points user possesses limit |
| figma-325 | Points and real values automatic calculation: synced field updates |
